name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-runtime
description: Cohesive public evidence-runtime API for Lachesis
author: Nicia AI

scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const api = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-runtime'); const node = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-runtime/node'); if (typeof api.run !== 'function' || typeof api.replay !== 'function' || typeof api.compilePlan !== 'function' || typeof node.createPrivateFileRecordingStore !== 'function') process.exit(1);"
